name: Emily Wilson
about: 5 years in luxury womenswear at Chanel and Dior. Professional-grade styling skills and client relationship builder. Retailers call her their go-to for special occasion appointments.
interviewTranscript: I've worked with luxury fashion for five years now—Chanel, Dior, Louis Vuitton. Styling is an art. You have to understand how different silhouettes work, how different proportions change the look, and most importantly how to make a customer feel beautiful. I've become the go-to person for special occasion appointments because I bring patience and expertise together. There's nothing better than finding the perfect look for someone's important event.
